steps.title: Identify the verb-object structure
steps.content: The blank comes after 'allows researchers' (verb + direct object) and before 'chemical reactions' (noun phrase). This is a verb + object + [blank] + noun arrangement.

steps.title: Apply the infinitive requirement
steps.content:
The verb 'allow' requires the infinitive form: allow [someone] to [action]. Therefore, only 'to study' properly completes the pattern by expressing what the technique enables, while the other options violate the infinitive requirement and fail to convey the enabled action.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
